evaluators.name: Cheapest Double-DIN Apple CarPlay Stereo Under $400 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the cheapest qualifying double-DIN Apple CarPlay stereo under $400 with rating ≥4 to the cart.

evaluators.name: Compare 6.5" Component Speakers and Wishlist Higher-RMS One
evaluators.description: Checks if the user compared two qualifying 6.5" component speaker sets and wishlisted the one with higher RMS power among the compared pair.

evaluators.name: Cheapest 4+ Star Stereo, Speakers, Subwoofer Under $600 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the cheapest qualifying stereo, speaker set, and subwoofer (rating ≥4) and that their combined prices are under $600.

evaluators.name: Most-Reviewed 4-Channel 600W+ Amp Under $350 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added a qualifying 4-channel amp with ≥600W RMS, under $350, rating ≥4, and preferably the most-reviewed one to the cart.

evaluators.name: Sub + Amp Bundle with Wiring Kit & Free Shipping (Qty 2) in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added a qualifying subwoofer + amplifier bundle including a wiring kit and free shipping, priced $250–$450, with quantity 2 to the cart.

evaluators.name: Second-Cheapest Civic-Fitting Bluetooth Backup-Camera Stereo in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user selected a 2018 Honda Civic Sedan, then added the second-cheapest fitting stereo with Bluetooth and backup camera input, under $500 and rating ≥4, to the cart.

evaluators.name: Premium Stereo with 3-Year Plan and Standard Shipping Checked Out
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed checkout for a qualifying premium stereo over $700 and rating ≥4.5, with a 3-year protection plan and Standard Shipping, and entered the specified contact info.

evaluators.name: Three Installation Accessories (Wiring Kit, Dash Kit, Antenna Adapter) Under $40 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added one qualifying amp wiring kit, one dash kit, and one antenna adapter, each under $40 and rating ≥4, to the cart.
